changes.before: The road south stopped pretending before Hearthglen did.
changes.after: South of Eastweald, the road showed the damage before Hearthglen came into view.

changes.before: The road ahead had no patience left for any of that.
changes.after: Ahead, the road had dropped all trace of ordinary farm traffic.

changes.before: The woman let go at once. Not comforted. Answered.
changes.after: The woman let go at once. Answered.

changes.before: His gaze shifted. "Lady Proudmoore."
changes.after: He turned to Jaina. "Lady Proudmoore."

changes.before: When the line thins, the field feeds itself again.
changes.after: When the line thins, fresh bodies start rising again.

changes.before: Uther glanced at her. "Yes. So I was told."
changes.after: Uther turned to her. "Yes. So I was told."

changes.before: There was no room in the sentence for hope.
His jaw shifted once. "Go on."
changes.after: "Go on."

changes.before: That earned the nearest thing to approval Sylvanas had yet seen in him. Sharper attention.
changes.after: That earned the nearest thing to approval Sylvanas had yet seen in him.

changes.before: The words landed hard and flat. The officer nearest the flap found his boots fascinating.
changes.after: The officer nearest the flap found his boots fascinating.

changes.before: The room tightened.
Jaina did not soften the answer to earn it.
changes.after: Jaina gave the answer flat.

changes.before: Falric's gaze flicked from Jaina to Arthas. He had probably heard men speak to the prince in many tones. That one was not common among them.
changes.after: Falric checked Jaina, then Arthas. He had probably heard men speak to the prince in many tones. That one was not common among them.

changes.before: Arthas's eyes went to Sylvanas.
changes.after: Arthas turned to Sylvanas.

changes.before: Sylvanas looked at the map, at Jaina's hand still braced over the quarter she had marked, at Uther standing behind the prince with fear locked down so hard it had become posture.
changes.after: Sylvanas looked at the map, at Jaina's hand still braced over the quarter she had marked, at Uther standing rigid behind the prince.

changes.before: The room from Scholomance tried to rise at the edge of memory and found no purchase. Jaina was not shielding what she'd learned there. She was already trying to ruin it.
changes.after: Scholomance pressed at the edge of memory and stayed there. Jaina was already trying to ruin it.

changes.before: Jaina's eyes met hers for one beat and dropped back to the table. No thanks. No relief. Only a harder line to the mouth, as if she had already put the answer to work.
changes.after: Jaina met her for one beat, then bent over the table again. No thanks. No relief. Only a harder line to the mouth, as if she had already put the answer to work.

changes.before: He turned away in the same motion and snapped three orders at once. Officers began moving before all three were finished. Uther stayed where he was, watching the room become its own consequence.
changes.after: He turned away in the same motion and snapped three orders at once. Officers began moving before all three were finished. Uther stayed where he was, watching the officers move.

changes.before: Jaina's mouth tightened.
changes.after: Jaina went still.

changes.before: Something in Arthas's face moved. Not enough to name.
His gaze shifted to Sylvanas. "And if the door isn't there."
changes.after: He turned to Sylvanas. "And if the door isn't there."

changes.before: An aide stood there in plain campaign wool, helping sort route strips by district and gate mark. Entirely ordinary. Dark hair damp at the temples. Mud on the hem. The kind of man nobody remembered because three hundred camps had raised him in the same shape.
changes.after: An aide stood there helping sort route strips by district and gate mark, in plain campaign wool with dark hair damp at the temples and mud on the hem, built for camp anonymity.

changes.before: Jaina had a foot in the stirrup when Sylvanas reached her. Up close the strain showed harder. Not fear. Use.
changes.after: Jaina had a foot in the stirrup when Sylvanas reached her. Up close the strain showed harder. Use.

changes.before: That was all. Not a full plan. The first hard edges of one.
changes.after: The first hard edges of a plan.

changes.before: Behind them the main column gathered itself into thunder. Ahead, the road to Stratholme ran between fields built to feed a city that might already be eating its own death.
changes.after: Behind them the main column gathered itself into thunder. Ahead, the road to Stratholme ran between fields built to feed a city where plague-tainted bread might already be reaching every table.
